positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, stylized depiction of a cosmic forest landscape. The composition must be centered, featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep indigo and sapphire nebula background. Include elegant, sweeping silhouettes of stylized trees, exotic glowing mushrooms, and floating crystalline structures. Use high contrast between the deep space blues/blacks and vibrant neon accents (cyan, magenta, electric green). The style should be a blend of neo-Art Nouveau and celestial psychedelia, optimized for clear linework and strong graphic impact suitable for screen printing on t-shirts. Ultra-clean, vector-like quality, magical realism, intricate details, symmetrical composition, rule of thirds adherence.
negative: blurry, grainy, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, username, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, messy, photorealistic, realistic photo, gradient noise
